intents.intent_description: Provide assistance and information about the bot's capabilities when the user requests help or asks what the bot can do.
intents.name: Help

utterances.utterance: I would like some help, please.
Would you be able to help me?
Can you provide details on how you may assist?

intents.intent_description: Handle user input that doesn't match any other defined intent, providing a fallback response to keep the conversation flowing.
intents.name: Default fallback intent

intents.intent_description: Acknowledge and respond appropriately when the user is ending the conversation with a farewell or departure expression.
intents.name: Goodbye

intents.intent_description: Respond appropriately when the user initiates conversation with a greeting or salutation, including hellos, time-based greetings, and casual farewells.
intents.name: Greetings

intents.intent_description: Handle user feedback indicating dissatisfaction with the bot's response, including complaints about inaccuracy, irrelevance, confusion, or general unhelpfulness.
intents.name: Not helpful

intents.intent_description: Acknowledge and respond appropriately when the user expresses gratitude or thanks.
intents.name: Thank you

intents.intent_description: Escalate the conversation to a human agent when the user requests to speak with a real person or human support.
intents.name: Talk to an agent
